URL: https://github.com/4sval/FModel
Language: c%23
Unreal Engine Archives Explorer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BeyondDimension/SteamTools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BeyondDimension/SteamTools
Language: c%23
🛠「Watt Toolkit」是一个开源跨平台的多功能 Steam 工具箱。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
Language: c%23
Synchronize Codex session provider metadata across rollout files and SQLite state.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenRA/OpenRA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA
Language: c%23
Open Source real-time strategy game engine for early Westwood games such as Command & Conquer: Red Alert written in C# using SDL and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux, *BSD and Mac OS X.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sonarr/Sonarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sonarr/Sonarr
Language: c%23
Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/microsoft-ui-reactor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/microsoft-ui-reactor
Language: c%23
Reactor is an experimental set of extensions to WinUI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw-windows-node
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw-windows-node
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: srwi/EverythingToolbar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/srwi/EverythingToolbar
Language: c%23
Everything integration for the Windows taskbar.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations
